calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondents Meeka Schmalle and Ludovic Racinet, with witness Marla Schmalle.
Defendant/Appellant Housing Corps, by building manager Shaughn Morgan.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent Meeka Schmalle testifies on her own behalf. Nine photos, introduced previously, are resubmitted from the previous hearing. Witness Marla Schmalle is examined on behalf of plaintiff.

Shaughn Morgan testifies on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Housing Corps.

Matter is taken under submission.

JPT John Gulick, Clerks Clark Banayad/Jeanie Dobbs, Not reported, (525)
